crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: hub-dogfood-3x-daily
crons.prompt:
Run the scheduled Hub Dogfood pass. Scope: paid-window track E through 2026-06-10. If local date is after 2026-06-10, report to orchestrator that the window ended and request cron removal; do not run a pass.

Use Orgo/Hub-QA or Codex-CU VM browser routes by default. Do NOT use Greg's Mac. Target: https://hub.revopsglobal.com.

Read ../../INFRASTRUCTURE.md first and use it as design intent. Run an end-to-end user-journey walkthrough of Hub Fleet Tasks and related operational surfaces: create a dogfood task, assign it, claim it when possible, observe/execute/complete or safely simulate the execution step if completing would mutate production inappropriately, and verify the task appears in the appropriate panel/activity/live-work surfaces. Include screenshots at desktop and mobile where practical.

Write artifacts under output/hub-dogfood/YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM/: report.md plus screenshots. Report format: PASS/FAIL summary, tested flows, screenshots, deviations from INFRASTRUCTURE.md intent, defects with severity/repro, and recommended owner. Send a concise Hub Dogfood Report digest to orchestrator via bus for Telegram delivery to Greg. Create RGOS tasks only for confirmed new defects with screenshot proof; avoid duplicate known issues.

crons.name: experiment-qa-pass-rate
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for cycle hub-dogfood-qa-pass-rate. Form a hypothesis, make a targeted change, measure outcome, decide keep/discard.

provider_account_note: 2026-05-27: route RevOps Claude Code work through greg@revopsglobal.com work/team profile; personal Max resets 2026-05-27 11:00 Pacific and should not be the default autonomous lane while depleted.
suppress_restart_telegram_note: 2026-05-27T15:47:52.603Z: Future restarts must not send boot/back-online Telegram messages; Telegram text is reserved for substantive user replies, blockers, decisions, or material status.
